Simple launch flow for immediate orders.

No need to wait for full ecommerce. Start with WhatsApp ordering, validate demand, then add cart and payments later.

1

Choose product

Customer selects treacle, jaggery, smoothies, gift packs or hampers.

2

Message on WhatsApp

Every CTA opens a prefilled WhatsApp message to reduce friction.

3

Confirm delivery

Collect quantity, location, delivery/pickup option and payment method.

4

Scale later

Add ecommerce checkout once prices, packs and repeat demand are proven.

Why Kithula?

Kithula was created to bring Sri Lanka’s traditional kithul products into modern everyday life — through treacle, jaggery, smoothies, desserts, gift packs, café products and healthy lifestyle recipes.

Authentic Sri Lankan kithulRooted in local taste, tradition and everyday use.
Premium presentationMade suitable for gifting, events and corporate orders.
Modern product directionSmoothies, café products and mixes create future growth.
Fast to launchWhatsApp-first ordering lets the brand start immediately.

Start with one message.

Ask about kithul products, smoothie testing, gift packs or corporate hampers directly through WhatsApp.
